title: Tokamak Superconducting Coil Winding | Broomfield Fusion Coil Solutions
note: Fetched. Incumbent US vendor selling winding machines for tokamak superconducting coils: adjustable mandrels/tooling, automation, tension/alignment monitoring. HTS/REBCO not explicitly named.

title: MRI Winding Machines | Superconducting Magnetic Resonance Imaging
note: Broomfield's existing superconducting MRI magnet winding machine product line.

title: Superconductor Cable & Coil Machinery | Ridgway Machines
note: UK vendor; has delivered complete HTS conductor production lines (winding, taping machines, PLC control).

title: HTS Cable Winding Machines
note: German vendor with catalog HTS cable winding machines: automatic layer control, programmable winding patterns.

title: Commonwealth Fusion Systems Selects 47-Acre Site in Devens, Mass., for Historic Commercial Fusion Energy Campus
note: CFS official: 47-acre Devens campus incl. 160,000 sq ft HTS-magnet manufacturing facility; vertical integration of winding. Replaces Wikipedia entry per audit fix #1.

title: CFS flexes magnet-manufacturing muscle to build the fusion ecosystem
note: CFS sells finished HTS magnets (e.g., WHAM) to the ecosystem — magnet supply, not machine demand.

title: Stellarator Showdown: Proxima Fusion vs. Type One Energy
note: Proxima built its own in-house HTS cable manufacturing line; stellarator entrants vertically integrating non-planar coil fabrication.

title: 核聚变用铠装高温超导线圈精密绕制设备 - 产业节点详情
note: Chinese supply-chain mapping already treats precision HTS fusion-coil winding equipment (multi-axis motion, constant tension, deformation monitoring, D-shape/racetrack 3D trajectories) as a defined industry node — domestic entrants expected.

title: 全球首台！中国公司建成运行全高温超导核聚变装置
note: 上海电气/能量奇点 built the world's first all-HTS tokamak (洪荒70) — Chinese heavy-equipment incumbents already possess HTS coil winding/assembly capability in-house.

title: US11581134 — Bifilar winding system for manufacture of poloidal field superconducting magnets for nuclear fusion
note: Granted patent covering a complete superconducting PF-coil winding production line (unwinding, straightening, cleaning, bending, inter-turn taping) — prior art/IP thicket around 'turnkey winding line' claims.
